sections.title: B: Original course practice
sections.instructions: Complete each original item using the target language from this lesson.

items.sentence: In this original question about Units 25, 26 and 27, choose the form that best completes the class project note: ...... .
options: A jobs. for applying people interviewing for
C for interviewing people applying for jobs. now
F for interviewing people applying for jobs.

sections.title: C: Original key word transformation practice
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Units 25, 26 and 27. **TOO**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Units 25, 26 and 27.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Units 25, 26 and 27. **UP**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Units 25, 26 and 27.

Sara began the exam workshop before the lesson on Units 25, 26 and 27. **OLD**
The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Units 25, 26 and 27.

Tom began the online lesson before the lesson on Units 25, 26 and 27. **OFF**
The online lesson ...... before the lesson on Units 25, 26 and 27.
